session_summary: First session. Scaffolded Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 + better-sqlite3. Built RTL Hebrew shell (header with logo + theme toggle, sidebar, main). Added dashboard page (כללי) + renters route stub. Designed and implemented the SQLite schema: zones, apartments, residents (flat, type='owner'|'renter'). DB bootstrap at src/lib/db.ts auto-creates tables on first import; data/raam.db gitignored. Dashboard renders live counts (apartments / active residents / zones).

stack.orm: none — raw SQL via prepared statements

schema.key_decisions: See memory/project_schema_decisions.md — one DB per building (no buildings table), floor is a column not a table, flat residents with type CHECK, zones as lookup, dates as ISO TEXT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP for defaults

routes./renters: דיירים — placeholder until CRUD is built

current_focus: Schema is in place. Next: build the renters/apartments/zones CRUD UI on the appropriate pages.
open_questions: Lobby PC OS — Windows? Affects launch packaging.
Initial data — does Moti have an Excel to import, or do we enter from scratch?
Which page hosts what: zones admin (/zones?), apartments (/apartments?), or all under /renters?
next_steps: Build zones CRUD (probably /zones) — small, gets us comfortable with server actions
Build apartments CRUD with zone picker
Build renters page — list, search, add/edit/move-out form
